name: SGX Sustainability Reporting (Comply-or-Explain)
requirement: Annual sustainability report on material ESG factors with a board statement.

name: SGX Mandatory Climate Reporting (TCFD-aligned)
requirement: TCFD-aligned climate disclosures including Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions.

name: IFRS S2 / ISSB Climate-related Disclosures
requirement: ISSB-aligned climate disclosures incl. Scope 3 roadmap and scenario analysis.

name: MAS Guidelines on Environmental Risk Management
requirement: Board-level environmental risk governance and disclosure for financial institutions.

name: ASEAN Taxonomy for Sustainable Finance
requirement: Classification/alignment of activities against the ASEAN Taxonomy.
